name: Monte's Conch Fritters W/Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oil in the deep fryer.
2. Rinse the conch meat and discard the orange fin and foot.
3. Use a food processor to chop the meat.
4. Remove the seeds and membranes from the peppers and onions; peel the onions.
5. Chop the onions and peppers into medium-sized pieces.
6. Place the chopped meat and vegetables in a mixing bowl.
7. Add the seasonings, egg, and flour to the bowl; mix until well combined.
8. Roll mixture into 1 ¼ inch balls.
9. Deep fry the fritters, adding one at a time to the hot oil and waiting several seconds before adding the next up to a maximum of five at a time.
10. Fry until golden and crisp (about 5 minutes per side).
11. Remove the fritters from the oil; drain on paper towels.
12. Serve with the mustard sauce prepared by combining the ingredients and adjusting salt and pepper to taste.
